name: com.github/github-mcp-server
title: GitHub
description: Repos, issues, pull requests, Actions, and code search - GitHub's official hosted MCP with OAuth.

byoClient.guide:
GitHub's MCP server (api.githubcopilot.com/mcp) reuses standard GitHub OAuth - you create an OAuth App on github.com and Wayland uses your credentials.

**1.** Open **github.com/settings/developers** → **OAuth Apps** → **New OAuth App**.

**2.** Fill in:
  - **Application name**: any (e.g. *Wayland MCP*)
  - **Homepage URL**: any (e.g. `https://localhost`)
  - **Authorization callback URL**: paste the URL Wayland shows below.

**3.** Click **Register application**, then **Generate a new client secret**.

**4.** Copy **Client ID** and **Client secret** and paste them below.

Wayland will request the `repo`, `read:org`, and `workflow` scopes on your behalf.

scopes.name: read:org
scopes.plainLanguage: List the organizations you belong to.
